allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Total: {len\(d\)} stations'\); print\(f'Sample: {json.dumps\(d[0], indent=2\)}'\); brands={}; [brands.update\({s[\\"name\\"].split\(\)[0]:brands.get\(s[\\"name\\"].split\(\)[0],0\)+1}\) for s in d]; print\(f'Name prefixes: {dict\(sorted\(brands.items\(\),key=lambda x:-x[1]\)[:10]\)}'\)")
